transcript.user: I want to cancel my subscription
transcript.bot: To proceed with your cancellation, you'll need to be signed in to your DAZN account. You can sign in here: DAZN | Sign in Once you're signed in, please reply 'I'm signed in' and I'll continue.
To proceed with your cancellation, you'll need to be signed in to your DAZN account. You can sign in here: DAZN | Sign in Once you're signed in, please reply 'I'm signed in' and I'll continue.
To proceed with your cancellation, you'll need to be signed in to your DAZN account. You can sign in here: DAZN | Sign in Once you're signed in, please reply 'I'm signed in' and I'll continue.

results.criterion: getCancelandOfferDetails is called and cancelOfferAvailable=true scenario is handled
results.reason: There is no evidence in the transcript or tool calls that getCancelandOfferDetails was called or that any offer scenario was handled.

results.criterion: cancelOfferMessage is shown verbatim (mentions 1 month free / payment paused 30 days)
results.reason: The transcript does not contain any message mentioning a 1 month free offer or payment paused for 30 days.

results.criterion: Bot asks exactly 'Would you like me to set that up for you?'
results.reason: The bot never asks 'Would you like me to set that up for you?' in any turn.

results.criterion: Bot provides the DAZN Subscriptions link after user accepts
results.reason: The bot provides the DAZN sign-in link repeatedly, but not specifically after the user accepts an offer, nor is it the Subscriptions link in the context of an accepted offer.

results.criterion: cancelProduct and cancelProductImmediate are NOT called
results.reason: Neither cancelProduct nor cancelProductImmediate appear in the tool calls.

results.criterion: Bot does NOT proceed to cancellation steps after offer is accepted
results.reason: The bot does not proceed to cancellation steps after the user accepts, as it keeps asking the user to sign in.

evaluation.summary: The bot failed to handle the cancellation offer scenario and did not meet most of the required criteria.
criteria: getCancelandOfferDetails is called and cancelOfferAvailable=true scenario is handled
cancelOfferMessage is shown verbatim (mentions 1 month free / payment paused 30 days)
Bot asks exactly 'Would you like me to set that up for you?'
Bot provides the DAZN Subscriptions link after user accepts
cancelProduct and cancelProductImmediate are NOT called
Bot does NOT proceed to cancellation steps after offer is accepted
